import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './TourCard.css'; const TourCard = ({ tour }) => { return (
${tour.price} {tour.featured && ( Featured )}

{tour.title}

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (4.5)
📍 {tour.city} {tour.distance} km

{tour.desc.length > 100 ? `${tour.desc.substring(0, 100)}...` : tour.desc}

👥 {tour.maxGroupSize} people
🕒 5 days
View Details
); }; export default TourCard;
